name: Vasquez Plumbing Co
tagline: Straight-talking plumbers Sonoma County has trusted since 2009.
seoDescription: Vasquez Plumbing Co — licensed, family-run plumbers serving Santa Rosa, Petaluma & Sonoma County since 2009. Upfront pricing, same-day repairs, 24/7 emergencies.
area: Santa Rosa, Petaluma & Sonoma County, CA

hero.heading: No surprises. Just plumbing done right.
hero.subheading: A licensed, family-run shop serving Santa Rosa and greater Sonoma County — upfront flat-rate pricing, same-day repairs, and a real person on the phone when the water won't stop.

images.heroAlt: Vasquez Plumbing Co service van in Santa Rosa, CA
images.storyAlt: A Vasquez Plumbing technician at work

about.heading: Family-run, Sonoma County born
body: Mateo Vasquez started this shop out of a single van in 2009 after a decade wrenching for the big outfits and watching customers get nickel-and-dimed. The idea was simple: quote the price before the work, do it once, do it right, and answer the phone yourself.

Fifteen years later we're a tight crew of licensed plumbers covering Santa Rosa, Petaluma, and the towns in between — but the rule hasn't changed. You'll get a flat price up front, a clean job site, and a plumber who explains what's actually going on under your house.

services.title: Leak detection & repair
services.description: Slab leaks, hidden drips, and pressure problems traced with acoustic and thermal tools — so we open one wall, not four.

services.title: Drain & sewer cleaning
services.description: Hydro-jetting and camera inspection for stubborn clogs and root intrusion, with the footage shown to you on the spot.

services.title: Water heaters
services.description: Tank and tankless installs, repairs, and flushes — most standard swaps done same-day with a 6-year labor warranty.

services.title: Repipes & remodels
services.description: Whole-home PEX and copper repipes plus kitchen and bath remodels, coordinated cleanly with your contractor.

hoursNote: 24/7 emergency line for burst pipes and no-water calls — we answer nights and weekends.

sections.heading: Everything from a dripping faucet to a full repipe

steps.title: Call or book online
steps.body: Tell us what's going on. We'll give you an arrival window and a real person's name.

steps.title: Upfront flat quote
steps.body: The plumber diagnoses on-site and quotes the full price before any work starts — you approve, then we begin.

steps.title: Done right, cleaned up
steps.body: We fix it, walk you through what we did, and leave the space cleaner than we found it.

sections.heading: Where we work
sections.note: Not sure if you're in range? Give us a call — if we can't help, we'll point you to someone who can.

items.quote: Burst pipe at 11pm and Mateo's guy was at the house within the hour. Quoted the price before touching anything and stuck to it. This is how it should work.
items.author: Dana R.

items.quote: They jetted a sewer line three other companies wanted to dig up, showed me the camera footage, and saved me thousands. Honest people.
items.author: Tom & Linda P.

items.quote: Tankless install done in an afternoon, spotless work, and they actually explained the maintenance. Easy five stars.
items.author: Priya S.

items.a: Diagnostic visits carry a small trip fee that we credit toward the repair if you move forward. The repair price itself is always flat-rate and approved by you first.
Yes — burst pipes and no-water emergencies get a live answer nights and weekends, and a tech dispatched as fast as we safely can.
All labor is warrantied (six years on standard water-heater installs), and we're fully licensed (C-36 #1029847) and insured.
